name: @patchworkos/deal-won-celebration
description: HubSpot deal closed-won trigger: celebrate in #wins Slack, log deal details to a Notion database.
author: patchworkos

deal_id.description: HubSpot deal ID (passed from webhook or entered manually)

SLACK_WINS_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel for deal celebration posts (e.g. #wins)

NOTION_DEALS_DB.description: Notion database ID where closed deals are logged

DEAL_OWNER_SLACK_ID.description: Slack user ID of the deal owner (for @mention). Optional.
